seoTitle: Tootenilla vs Torrens Island — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Tootenilla and Torrens Island. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Tootenilla vs Torrens Island: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Tootenilla and Torrens Island.
heading: Tootenilla vs Torrens Island — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Tootenilla, South Australia and Torrens Island, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Tootenilla has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Torrens Island (34/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Tootenilla or Torrens Island safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Tootenilla has a flood risk score of 31/100, while Torrens Island scores 48/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Tootenilla scores 26/100 for bushfire risk. Torrens Island scores 23/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Tootenilla or Torrens Island?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Tootenilla has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.53% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
